title: veronica anagallis-aquatica var. lepida
intro: Veronica anagallis-aquatica var. lepida, also known as a water speedwell, is a plant species belonging to the Veronicaceae family. It is a flowering plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Veronica anagallis-aquatica var. lepida include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
